name: Bean Delight
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds pinto beans, cooked and mashed
2 onions, sautéed in a little stock
1 green pepper, sautéed in the same stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare plain pinto beans and serve with fresh bread.
2. The next evening, take the remaining beans and add them to a pot.
3. Sauté 2 onions in a little stock until softened.
4. Add sautéed green pepper to the beans.
5. Incorporate 2 cans tomato sauce (unsalted) into the beans.
6. Add 1 can frozen corn.
7. Sprinkle with spices: 1 tablespoon cumin and 2 tablespoons chili powder.
8. Mix well and serve.
